spec.name: A Shaded Path Though The Forest
spec.description: You are on a small shaded path leading between the trees. The forest gradually becomes more dense to the west. Paths lead north and east, and you see a small clearing to the south.

north.description: The path winds its way between the trees.

east.description: The path winds its way between the trees.

south.description: A lightly traveled path heads southward to a small clearing.

extra_descs.description: The shaded path is probably used by the small animals living in the forest.
The trees are mostly old beeches and oaks.
